title: dimocarpus fumatus subsp. javensis
intro: Dimocarpus fumatus subsp. javensis, commonly known as the Java plum or Javan plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dimocarpus fumatus subsp. javensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
